name: Stimulus Generator: Requirements for the Settings of the Trace Window Export
title: Stimulus Generator: Requirements for the Settings of the Trace Window Export
description: If the output of the trace shall be used as input for this stimuli, you have to do the following settings in the Export Settings dialog (Export context menu command of the Trace Window – menu path Advanced Settings|[Settings…]):
tables: The identifier for the time column can be 't, 'T' or 'Time'
Stimulus supports the 3 possibilities of the trace export
Stimulus supports two formats: Check box active (unit: s) Check box inactive (unit: 10us)
The limiter has to be Comma ',' or Semi-colon ';'
The limiter has to be a point, not a comma.
The CSV file has to contain one table with a time column if necessary and columns for every signal (first and second option of the window below).
